steps: Construct full or chunked four-level profiles.
Compute an F2 basis for H2 = ker(partial_2)/im(partial_3).
Choose representative four-level profile differences for each H2 generator.
Certify each residue in a nonnegative cone.
Combine H2-positive residues with the existing three-level certificates.
pass_condition: Every H2 generator has an exact nonnegative residue certificate for w=12 and w=16.
fail_condition: A generator has a negative residue evaluation or cannot be certified by any tested cone.
